title: (Bushy Leaves) dronko's alternative Bushy Leaves
description: better busy leaves designed to be less lagy than over busy leaves packs
body:
# **Better Bushy Leaves**

designed to be less lagy compared to over bushy leaves packs.                             
compatible with any resolution of pack, it works with any resource pack with its own leaves, even if it has its own bushy leaves and want this one just put this pack above the over pack in the resource packs tab!
# varents 
oak, dark oak, birch, azalea, jungle and mangrove have random cubes
![oak leaves](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7d2c0b21d54494012348196f6bff9d3561f9b0bb.png)
spruce and acacia have more flat cubes
![spruce leaves](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7351b24bb0d0ea67a55c2c836e4fe1018acc2a3f.png)

this pack only adds one maby two more cubes to ech leaf bock overs may add up to six per block being the worst of them.

need a minecraft server? [get one here](https://billing.apexminecrafthosting.com/aff.php?aff=16071) thrue the affiliate program to helpp me out!
![apex hosting affiliate](https://cdn.apexminecrafthosting.com/img/theme/apex-hosting-mobile.png)
